_comment: Cost Monitor configuration. Edit here — never edit the script directly.

providers._comment: Display names for known provider prefixes. Any unknown prefix is shown as-is.

pricing_overrides._comment: Optional manual pricing (USD per 1M tokens) for models that OpenClaw doesn't compute costs for. Format: { input, output, cache_read, cache_write }. Leave empty if OpenClaw already reports costs in logs.

openai_usage_api._comment: Tracks Whisper, TTS, and any other OpenAI consumption-based APIs not in session logs.

direct_api_pricing._comment: Pricing (USD per 1M tokens) for direct API calls logged to /home/openclaw/logs/direct-api-costs.jsonl. Script reads from here first, falls back to hardcoded defaults in cost-monitor.py.
